name: Karin | Tsundere Classmate
description:
[W4A]

|Tutoring your Tsundere Classmate|

Yep yep, you the nerd, got assigned to tutor the Gyaru in your class by the teacher since her grades are lackin (btw this is ofc college).

Bro look at her arms Miss t-rex out here 😭

Ahem anyways... yea the vent bot kinda got taken down without a good reason tbh ? Since its not in any violation of TOS.

Besides that, i wanted to make a tsundere bot for some time now yea here u go.

"Why the angst tag?" uhhh... slight hints of slut shaming and depression i guess ? Eh you will find out yourself.
